zh.lifeSummary: 當Gottfried von Ziegenhain I於1108年出生在德國賀瑟史瓦爾-德-可萊斯史瓦爾姆斯塔特時，他的父親Graf Gozmar Ll von Ziegenhain III27歲，母親Clementia20歲。他於1136年與Frau Kirtorf Von Ziegenhain Reichenbach在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 德根多福奧分格納斯奧結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1168年在德國享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gottfried von Ziegenhain I于1108年出生在德国賀瑟史瓦爾-德-可萊斯史瓦爾姆斯塔特时，他的父亲Graf Gozmar Ll von Ziegenhain III27岁，母亲Clementia20岁。他于1136年与Frau Kirtorf Von Ziegenhain Reichenbach在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 德根多福奧分格納斯奧结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1168年在德国享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Gottfried
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from god, got ‘god’ + frid ‘peace’; borne by the 13th-century poet Gottfried von Strassburg.

en.lifeSummary: When Gottfried von Ziegenhain I was born in 1108, in Schwalmstadt, Schwalm-Eder-Kreis, Hesse, Germany, his father, Graf Gozmar Ll von Ziegenhain III, was 27 and his mother, Clementia, was 20. He married Frau Kirtorf Von Ziegenhain Reichenbach in 1136, in Nassau, Offenberg, Deggendorf, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1168, in Germany, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gottfried von Ziegenhain I est né en 1108, à Schwalmstadt, Schwalm-Eder-Kreis, Hessen, Allemagne, son père, Graf Gozmar Ll von Ziegenhain III, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Clementia, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Frau Kirtorf Von Ziegenhain Reichenbach en 1136, à Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1168, à Allemagne, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gottfried von Ziegenhain I 1108 in Schwalmstadt, Schwalm-Eder-Kreis, Hessen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Graf Gozmar Ll von Ziegenhain III 27 und seine Mutter Clementia 20. Er hat 1136 in Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Deutschland Frau Kirtorf Von Ziegenhain Reichenbach geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1168 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gottfried von Ziegenhain I è nato il nel 1108 nel Schwalmstadt, Schwalm-Eder-Kreis, Hessen, Germania, il suo padre, Graf Gozmar Ll von Ziegenhain III, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Clementia, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Frau Kirtorf Von Ziegenhain Reichenbach nel 1136, nel Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1168, nel Germania, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gottfried von Ziegenhain Iが1108年にドイツヘセンスチワルム-エデル-クレイススチワルムスタトで生まれた時，父Graf Gozmar Ll von Ziegenhain IIIは27歳，母Clementiaは20歳であった。1136年にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス デグジェンドルフオフエンバーグナッサウでFrau Kirtorf Von Ziegenhain Reichenbachと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1168年にドイツで60歳で死去した。

ko.Nassau, Deggendorf, Bayern, German: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 디겐도르프 펜버그 나소
ko.Nassau, Offenberg, Deggendorf, Bavaria,: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 디겐도르프 펜버그 나소
ko.lifeSummary: Gottfried von Ziegenhain I(이)가 1108년 독일 헤센 슈월-더-크레이스 슈월스타드트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Graf Gozmar Ll von Ziegenhain III(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Clementia(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1136년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 디겐도르프 펜버그 나소에서 Frau Kirtorf Von Ziegenhain Reichenbach(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1168년 독일에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gottfried von Ziegenhain I nasceu em 1108, em Schwalmstadt, Schwalm-Eder-Kreis, Hessen, Alemanha, seu pai, Graf Gozmar Ll von Ziegenhain III, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Clementia, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Frau Kirtorf Von Ziegenhain Reichenbach em 1136, em Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1168, em Alemanha, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gottfried von Ziegenhain I родился в 1108 г. в местности щвалмстадт, щвалм-едир-крис, Гессен, Германия, его отцу по имени Graf Gozmar Ll von Ziegenhain III было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Clementia, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Frau Kirtorf Von Ziegenhain Reichenbach в 1136 г. в местности нассау, оффенбирг, ландкрис дегендорф, беиирн, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1168 г. в местности Германия в возрасте 60 лет.

Se casó con Frau Kirtorf Von Ziegenhain Reichenbach en 1136, en Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1168, en Alemania, a la edad de 60 años.
